title: Lead Infrastructure Engineer, Network Connectivity
description:
Assume a vital position as a key member of a high-performing team that delivers infrastructure and performance excellence. Your role will be instrumental in shaping the future at one of the world's largest and most influential companies.

As a Lead Infrastructure Engineer at JPMorgan Chase within the Infrastructure Platforms, you apply deep knowledge of software, applications, and technical processes within the infrastructure engineering discipline. Continue to evolve your technical and cross-functional knowledge outside of your aligned domain of expertise. You will be responsible for leading end-to-end delivery of network and connectivity services across the APAC region. You will partner with internal business stakeholders, service delivery teams and external telecom providers to ensure high-quality, timely, and cost-effective deployment of network solutions that meet business requirements and engineering standards.

Job responsibilities

• Oversee service delivery for all connectivity projects across APAC, ensuring solutions are implemented on time, within budget and to defined quality standards

• Partner with internal stakeholders and technology teams to capture and translate business connectivity requirements into executable network solutions

• Coordinate with telecom service providers, vendors, and internal engineering teams throughout the delivery lifecycle – from design to acceptance testing and handover to operations.

• Track project progress, identify risks and implement mitigation plans to ensure seamless delivery and stakeholder satisfaction.

• Manage change control, cost governance, and documentation across all connectivity projects.

• Support regional and global network strategy execution, contributing to process improvements and service optimization initiatives.

• Maintain strong relationships with key suppliers, driving performance against SLAs and service improvement plans.

• Contribute to capacity planning, data analytics and reporting, transforming delivery data into actionable insights for senior management.

Required qualifications, capabilities, and skills

• Minimum 5+ years of experience with proven project or service delivery management background within a global financial or regulated enterprise environment.

• Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Data Science, or related disciplines

• Deep knowledge of networking and telecommunications technologies (Layers 0-3), including dark fiber, DWDM, Ethernet, IP-VPN, DIA, broadband, cellular and satellite connectivity.

• Experience working with telecom service providers and managed service providers, including contract and SLA oversight.

• Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence and build trust across business and technical domains.

• Solid organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple concurrent project across geographies.

• Experience using Atlassian tools (Jira and Confluence) for workflow, documentation and reporting.

Preferred qualifications, capabilities, and skills

• Familiarity with cloud connectivity and hybrid architectures.

• Data analytical skills – ability to interrogate, model and visualise large datasets to identify trends, cost drivers, or delivery risks.

• Exposure to lean process improvement or continuous improvement methodologies

• Experience in vendor governance and service improvement planning a plus.

• Professional certifications such as PMP, ITIL, or networking vendor accreditations are desirable.


To apply for this position, please use the following URL:

https://ars2.equest.com/?response_id=709bad5a2d1c2338253d00857534cdd8

postedCompany.description:
About J.P. Morgan

J.P. Morgan has been a leader in helping companies grow and markets develop throughout our history. We collaborate across the globe to deliver the solutions and advice to meet our clients’ needs, anywhere in the world.  We operate in 100 countries and hold global leadership positions across our businesses. When you join J.P. Morgan you’ll be: working with a team committed to being the best; earning the trust of our clients; demanding excellence of yourself.

What makes this the best place to build your career? Because we’ll make the most of all your talents, not just your technical skills. We’ll challenge you, but we’ll also make being here as stimulating and diverse as your life is. You’ll be given the tools, training and support needed to help us keep doing first-class business in a first-class way, as we have for over 200 years. Our global platform allows you to have more mobility, choices and opportunities to contribute than you ever imagined. It all adds up to the perfect opportunity to take your career further with us.
postedCompany.name: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
